corePrinciple: The homepage is not a brand statement. It is a routing layer.

aboveTheFold.rationale: Heat score 8.4 — serves hr-benefits-manager + benefits-consultant + benefits-buyer-procurement + total-rewards-professional + finance-leader + legal-compliance + it-security + member + provider + partner
Heat score 8.3 — serves benefits-consultant + total-rewards-professional + provider
Heat score 8.3 — serves benefits-buyer-procurement + legal-compliance + it-security
Heat score 8.2 — serves hr-benefits-manager + benefits-buyer-procurement + finance-leader
Heat score 8 — serves benefits-buyer-procurement + legal-compliance + it-security

primaryCTA.rationale: Primary buyer persona. Demo request is the highest-value conversion for sales pipeline.
primaryCTA.placement: Above the fold, primary button, repeated in nav

secondaryCTAs.rationale: Broker persona needs a distinct path — they are not booking demos, they need materials.
secondaryCTAs.placement: Secondary CTA area or dedicated broker pathway

secondaryCTAs.rationale: Visitors not yet ready to demo need a trust-building next step.
secondaryCTAs.placement: Below primary CTA or as tertiary nav link

routingStrategy.splitPoint: Above the fold — messaging and CTAs should self-select each persona

brokerPath.label: Broker path
brokerPath.headline: Speak to differentiation, implementation, broker support

excludedFromHomepage.reason: Low heat score — does not serve a priority user story for either persona
